name: Safety Circuit Appraisal
description: Pre-certification safety circuit appraisal for electronic hardware: parses schematic + BOM, identifies safety-critical components and isolation barriers, performs single-fault analysis (open/short) on each, checks ratings against IEC 62368-1 / 61010 / 60601-1 / UL 60950, and produces a structured report with recommendations. Orchestrates pdf-reader, schematic-intelligence, power-electronics, circuit-solver, and datasheet-intelligence.
author: lgili
